title: The 7 Best Utility Stocks to Buy as Yields Rise
text: With monetary policy possibly about to take a turn for the worst for risk-on assets, investors should consider the best utility stocks to buy. Unfortunately for Wall Street, the Personal Consumption Expenditures (PCE) index came in hotter than economists anticipated.

title: The 10 Biggest Utilities With Over 50% Gross Margin
text: Profits for utility companies vary widely depending on region to region. Despite this, the utility sector enjoys relatively high profit margins, primarily due to barriers to entry and other legislative restrictions on competition.

title: WEC Energy Group (WEC) Beats Q4 Earnings & Revenue Estimates
text: WEC Energy Group's (WEC) fourth-quarter earnings and revenues beat estimates. WEC gains from strong returns from its infrastructure and transmission segments.

title: WEC Energy Group, Inc. (WEC) Q4 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: WEC Energy Group, Inc. (NYSE:WEC ) Q4 2022 Results Conference Call February 2, 2023 2:00 PM ET Company Participants Gale Klappa - Executive Chairman Scott Lauber - President and CEO Xia Liu - CFO Conference Call Participants Shar Pourreza - Guggenheim Partners Julien Dumoulin-Smith - Bank of America Jeremy Tonet - JPMorgan Michael Sullivan - Wolfe Research Durgesh Chopra - Evercore ISI Andrew Weisel - Scotiabank Anthony Crowdell - Mizuho Vedula Murti - Hudson Bay Capital Operator Good afternoon, and welcome to WEC Energy Group's Conference Call for Fourth Quarter and Year End ‘22 Results. This call is being recorded for rebroadcast, and all participants are in a listen-only mode at this time.

title: Utilities to Report Q4 Earnings on Feb 2: CMS, WEC & BIP
